examples: In her conclusion, the author sounds a cautionary note.
Barely fifteen months later, it has become a cautionary tale of the pitfalls of international mergers and acquisitions.
Venus has long been held up as a cautionary tale for everything that could go wrong on a planet like earth.
Nobody wants to become the next cautionary tale splayed across the pages of Forbes.
The other cautionary tale is Affymetrix, the company that used to dominate DNA chips.
